# Hicks Consulting, PLLC

Hicks Consulting, PLLC provides therapy in Tennessee and coaching nationwide for Black women navigating burnout, boundaries, and life transitions.

Primary routes:
- /therapy/
- /coaching/
- /intake-quiz/
- /request-consult/
- /book-discovery-call/
- /resources/

Key entities:
- Hicks Consulting, PLLC
- Monika Hicks, LCSW
- Coaching by Monika Hicks
